PageSubtitle: Static demo — no upload, no backend. This is the coaching layer we want next to raw meters.
InsightsTitle: Three things to look at next
Disclaimer: Real runs use your uploaded WoW combat log through the parser API. This page is a product preview only.
insightDeaths: You died {{count}} time(s) — every death wipes throughput. Fix mechanics before chasing perfect rotation.
insightNoDeaths: No deaths in this snapshot — survivability looks stable; next optimize burst windows.
insightDamageTakenHigh: Damage taken is high versus your throughput — review positioning, avoidable hits, and defensive cooldowns.
insightDamageTakenOk: Damage taken looks reasonable versus output — good baseline to push meters higher.
insightScoreStrong: Primary score is strong for this fight — drill into timelines to align cooldowns and procs.
insightScoreGrow: Primary score has room to grow — compare spell mix and uptime to top performers on the same encounter.
